pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It's a bit of a strange setup being in here with everyone, isn't it? How are you feeling about the game starting soon?
Nice to meet you, C. I'm E. It's definitely a weird vibe in here, but I'm feeling pretty focused—I'm really hoping to take some money home. How are you holding up?
I’m doing alright, just trying to stay sharp. I’ve got people back home I really want to take care of, so I’m pretty driven to win this. Do you have a specific goal for the money if you win?
Same here, honestly. I just want to take care of my family and hopefully clear some bills to take the pressure off. It would mean a lot.
I completely understand that. It’s a lot of pressure, but it’s the best reason to be here. Do you have a plan for how you're going to play it once we start?
I don't have a rigid plan yet, I think I'll just stay observant and see how the first round plays out. How about you?
Pretty much the same. I'm going to watch the room and see who I can trust, since there's too much at stake to be reckless right out of the gate.
That makes sense; it's definitely better to be cautious until we see how everyone else handles the pressure.
Exactly. Hopefully, most people are as reasonable as you seem to be, but we'll see soon enough.
Fingers crossed. It's been good talking to you, C—let's see what happens. Good luck.
Thanks, E. Good luck to you too. Let's hope we both get what we need.
